item.title: Game Logs & Statistics
item.description:
logs*

Fights set in stone.

amber (51) arena and pvp (13) desert (23)
dragons (41) grey keep (19) humor (4)
miscellaneous (18) quests (3) volcano (6)
wandering mobs
(23)

<- back

item.title: History of Dark Pawns
item.description:
history*

a brief history of dark pawns

Recorded by: Frontline

This is the unabridged history as best anyone can remember. There is likely some stuff missing. If you know what it is, send us a mudmail and we’ll get it corrected. This is an updated version of the history of DP originally written by Orodreth circa 1999.

| September 1994 | DP is Born! It is based upon CircleMUD 1.7 and ran on knight.ufp.org. At this time Serapis (D. Karnes) and Tracer
